ops.text: Fix Network-on-Main-Thread, Storage Permissions, and AI Parsing logic

ops.replace_with:
import org.json.JSONObject
import kotlinx.coroutines.launch
import kotlinx.coroutines.Dispatchers
import kotlinx.coroutines.withContext
import android.os.Build
import android.os.Environment
import android.content.Intent
import android.provider.Settings

ops.find_block: return f"Searching for {package_name}...\nError: Runtime PIP requires manual wheel building in Chaquopy build.gradle for Android security. Please add 'install \"{package_name}\"' to your build.gradle and rebuild."
ops.replace_with:
return f"[PIP STATUS] Package: {package_name}
Result: Dynamic installation blocked.
Reason: Android security restricts runtime site-packages modification.

Fix: Add 'install "{package_name}"' to the python/pip block in app/build.gradle and re-sync Gradle."

ops.text: Introduce formatSize utility and standardize file size display across scanner methods

ops.find_block:
import androidx.compose.material.icons.Icons
import androidx.compose.material.icons.filled.*
import androidx.compose.ui.graphics.Color

object FileScanner {

items.add(FileItem(
                        name = file.name,
                        meta = if (isDir) "Folder" else "${file.length() / 1024} KB",
                        icon = if (isDir) Icons.Default.Folder else Icons.Default.Description,
                        color = if (isDir) Color(0xFF00E5FF) else Color.Gray,
                        path = file.absolutePath,
                        lastModified = file.lastModified(),
                        size = file.length()
                    ))
ops.replace_with:
items.add(FileItem(
                        name = file.name,
                        meta = if (isDir) "Folder" else formatSize(file.length()),
                        icon = if (isDir) Icons.Default.Folder else Icons.Default.Description,
                        color = if (isDir) Color(0xFF00E5FF) else Color.Gray,
                        path = file.absolutePath,
                        lastModified = file.lastModified(),
                        size = file.length()
                    ))

operations.message: ✨ AI: The logic is identical, but the patch changed size calculation from KB to using formatSize, adding a variable declaration....
operations.explanation: The logic is identical, but the patch changed size calculation from KB to using formatSize, adding a variable declaration.
